• Procedural world generation with depth‑based heat, ore rarity, and discoverable teleporters.
  • Rich UI: mobile controls, customizable HUD gauges, modals for shop, inventory, warp, settings, and custom texture loading.
  • Multiplayer sync via MQTT, host election, trade system, and admin panel for player management.
    Game.init()
    Shop.buy(item)

This web game creates an infinite mining world where players drill, build, and trade resources while managing fuel, hull, and heat. It supports both single‑player and synchronized multiplayer sessions, offers a shop for upgrades, and provides extensive UI controls and custom texture support. The system also handles host failover, auto‑saving, and cloud sync via Puter.
